ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the agency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agency's responsibilities and scope */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the agency record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the agency record was last updated */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the agency is currently active */,
  "agency_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the agency, useful for quick reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency conducting the meeting */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "meeting_location" TEXT /* Location of the meeting */,
  "meeting_type" TEXT /* Type of meeting (e.g., board meeting, committee meeting) */,
  "agenda_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the agenda document */,
  "minutes_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the minutes document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the meeting record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the meeting record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the meeting (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the meeting record */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the meeting record */,
  "attendees" TEXT /* List of attendees separated by commas */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson of the meeting */,
  "meeting_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the meeting in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, recorder, auditor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user record was last updated */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the meeting */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the meeting was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the meeting */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the meeting (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_access_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meeting the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the meeting document */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_versions_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_versions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_versions_approved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., agenda, minutes) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the file was created */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_files_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_files_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the note is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text content of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the note was last updated */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., action item, follow-up, general) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_notes_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
